violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Inspector observed single service items stored less than 6 inches off the ground. Single service/single use articles must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves under the hot holding units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The pipe under the sanitizer bay is lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Inspector observed dumpster lid in poor repair (lid was detached). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The recycle dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The floors (especially under shelves/equipment), walls, and ceilings (especially the back storage area) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The light bulb in the walk-in freezer area is in poor repair (missing bulb). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Employees' clothing (sweater) were observed stored in the walk-in cooler area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The floor in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. Floor tiles observed missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
